title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.1 — C1 UI, stage 2a (layout): (1) selectors now render as FILLED C1 tiles (drawC1SelectorTile on the three selector LookAndFeels) instead of hollow outlined buttons, so they read like the value tiles; (2) module row reordered COMPRESS -> GRIT -> AMBER to match the mockup. DSP untouched. Remaining to fully match the mockup (stage 2b): GRIT SPEED/CAL/BIAS/AGE -> TWEAK, AMBER stage labels -> vertical side-tags, selector labels inside the tile, top-down GR meter, bottom section raised. Confirm the selector tiles + new order look right, then I roll the rest.
